data.content: Root cause: lightbox onShipBeat callback doesn't pass repo context with the beat. The beat from fetchBeat() lacks _repoPath, so handleShipBeat falls back to activeRepo (possibly undefined), causing AutoRoutingBackend to use BdCliBackend instead of KnotsBackend. Fix: augment beat with _repoPath in lightbox before calling onShipBeat (1 line change in beat-detail-lightbox.tsx:356).
